summary: Linked the Ground Zebes route translation unit by changing grzebesroute.c from NonMatching to Matching, completing grZebesRoute_8020B548 and cleaning related constants/asserts/data symbols. The bot report records one new match for main/melee/gr/grzebesroute: grZebesRoute_8020B548 from 99.97% to 100.00%, with linked code/data increases.

key_files.role: Main source update: completed grZebesRoute_8020B548, converted generated-style constants/asserts to source forms, added helper inlines/includes, and removed no-longer-needed named literal/static constants.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: src/melee/gr/grzebesroute.c hunks
text_corpus: bot report lists grZebesRoute_8020B548 as new 100.00% match

key_files.role: Build configuration update: changed melee/gr/grzebesroute.c from NonMatching to Matching.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: configure.py Object(NonMatching) to Object(Matching) for melee/gr/grzebesroute.c

key_files.role: Symbol metadata update: converted several grZe_Route local strings/floats/color data symbols to local @ labels and added local labels for grZe route data/rodata objects.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: symbols.txt .rodata/.data/.sdata/.sdata2 hunks

what_changed.text: configure.py now marks Object(Matching, "melee/gr/grzebesroute.c") instead of NonMatching.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: configure.py hunk around MatchingFor

what_changed.text: grZebesRoute_8020B548 was implemented in C, replacing the nonmatching marker with a function that iterates up to three light objects, sets colors/positions/interests, and applies spot/distance attenuation based on LOBJ type and y-position.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: grzebesroute.c removal of /// #grZebesRoute_8020B548 and new function body
text_corpus: bot report new match grZebesRoute_8020B548 99.97% to 100.00%

what_changed.text: Named static float/GXColor/string objects for local literals were removed from grzebesroute.c and their uses were replaced with inline literals, __FILE__, HSD_ASSERT, and local GXColor initializers.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: deletion of grZe_Route_803E5E64, grZe_Route_804D4840, grZe_Route_804D4848, grZe_Route_804DB918 through grZe_Route_804DB944
raw_diff: OSReport now uses __FILE__; HSD_ASSERT replaces __assert; literals such as -50.0f, 600.0f, 0.03f are inline

what_changed.text: The light iteration shape in grZebesRoute_8020B548 changed from a manual while loop with trailing increments to a for loop carrying both the counter increment and HSD_LObjGetNext step.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: grzebesroute.c loop changed from i=0; while (...) { ... i++; lobj = HSD_LObjGetNext(lobj); } to for (i = 0; ...; i++, lobj = ...)

what_changed.text: symbols.txt changed the removed grZe_Route local literals/constants from global symbols to local labels such as @187, @270, @274, @211-@278, and added local labels at grZe_Route_803B83A0 and grZe_Route_803E5DB0.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: symbols.txt hunks for 0x803B83A0, 0x803E5DB0, 0x803E5E64, 0x804D4840, 0x804D4848, 0x804DB918-0x804DB944

smart_moves.text: Kept ordinary constants and assert strings as source-level forms rather than named globals, while moving symbol metadata to local labels to preserve section ownership.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: grzebesroute.c literal replacements
raw_diff: symbols.txt global-to-local label changes

smart_moves.text: Used HSD_ASSERT for expanded assert behavior in grZebesRoute_8020B548 and __FILE__ for the OSReport filename argument, aligning the source with common macro/file idioms.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: __assert replaced by HSD_ASSERT; grZe_Route_803E5E64 replaced by __FILE__

smart_moves.text: Removed a local padding array in the lower point-light branch once the function was matched, avoiding an unnecessary stack-shaping artifact in the final source.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: deletion of int pad[3] in LOBJ_POINT/current_pos.y < split_y branch

decomp_lessons.lesson: When named globals are only representing ordinary local literals, assert strings, floats, or small color constants, a matching cleanup may inline them in source and represent the backing data with local labels in symbols.txt instead of retaining semantic-looking global names.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: grzebesroute.c removes grZe_Route_804DB918 through grZe_Route_804DB944 and inlines values
raw_diff: symbols.txt converts those addresses to local @ labels

decomp_lessons.lesson: Expanded assert blocks in decompiled output can often be recovered as HSD_ASSERT when the line number and condition are preserved.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: __assert(..., 0x169U, "gobj") becomes HSD_ASSERT(0x169, gobj)
raw_diff: __assert(..., 0x174U, "0") becomes HSD_ASSERT(0x174, 0)

decomp_lessons.lesson: A natural for loop can express a bounded traversal over an object linked list while preserving the same counter and next-pointer update used by matching code.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: grZebesRoute_8020B548 while loop converted to for loop with i++ and HSD_LObjGetNext

naming_conventions.convention: Use short role names such as gobj for local HSD_GObj pointers when the role is clear.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: local light_gobj renamed to gobj and used in HSD_ASSERT(0x169, gobj)

naming_conventions.convention: Keep unresolved route-global data names such as grZe_Route_803B83A0 and grZe_Route_804D6A60 where the PR does not provide stronger semantic names.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: grZe_Route_803B83A0 and grZe_Route_804D6A60 remain named and referenced

naming_conventions.convention: Generated/local data labels in symbols.txt may use local @NNN names for literals/constants that are no longer intended as source globals.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: symbols.txt @187, @270, @274, @211-@278 replacements

assembly_or_matching_tactics.tactic: Introduce narrow inline helper wrappers for operations whose call/access shape affects matching, such as casting light_gobj->hsd_obj, calling HSD_LObjGetNext, and masking LObj flags.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: grZebesRoute_8020B548_inline1
raw_diff: grZebesRoute_8020B548_inline2
raw_diff: grZebesRoute_8020B548_inline3

assembly_or_matching_tactics.tactic: Replace named float and GXColor globals with inline literals and local initializers when symbol metadata is adjusted to local labels and the bot verifies the function match.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: inline literals and GXColor initializers in grZebesRoute_8020B548
text_corpus: bot report new match grZebesRoute_8020B548 100.00%

assembly_or_matching_tactics.tactic: Use a for loop for the light traversal to keep the counter increment and next-object update in the loop header.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: for (i = 0; i < 3 && lobj != NULL; i++, lobj = grZebesRoute_8020B548_inline2(lobj))

assembly_or_matching_tactics.tactic: Remove a PAD-like local once matching source no longer requires it.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: deletion of int pad[3]

source_update_candidates.title: Inline local literals while fixing symbols metadata
source_update_candidates.text: This PR is an example, not a new rule by itself: ordinary local floats, colors, assert strings, and file names were moved from semantic-looking globals back into source-level literals/macros while symbols.txt retained addresses as local labels.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: grzebesroute.c removes named local constants and inlines values
raw_diff: symbols.txt local label replacements
source_update_candidates.reason: The pattern reinforces existing literals-and-data-ownership and data-sections standards; curator may want this PR as an example rather than a separate standard.

rejection_notes: Do not infer that all grZe_Route globals should be renamed or localized; the PR only localizes the specific literal/constant symbols shown in the diff.
Do not infer that the inline helper names are a global naming convention; they appear as matching tactics scoped to grZebesRoute_8020B548.
